name: com.unity.burst
description: Burst is a compiler that translates from IL/.NET bytecode to highly optimized native code using LLVM.

_upm.changelog:
### Fixed
- Fixed that types implementing interfaces that define methods with the same name (like `IFoo.Run()` and `IBar.Run()`) would cause Burst to always only pick one of them when resolving calls to either.
- Fixed cases where Burst could be stripped from player builds with high managed stripping enabled when Burst is only used through the `[BurstCompile]` attribute.

### Changed
- Updated Burst's internal version of Cecil.
